title: Operational inputs for PCR-GLOBWB2 data derived reservoir operations
author: Steyaert, Jennie
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This zenodo contains all the input files necessary to run the data derived operations in PCR-GLOBWB2 (static DOI  10.5281/zenodo.17589688). Inside the zip there are reservoir id maps for 250km, 650 km, and 1100km that correspond to the downstream command areas we analyzed in Steyaert et al., 2025. We also include the reservoir use map and the yearly reservoir maps (  lakes_and_reservoirs_05min_geodar_2023.nc). There is also a folder title 10_param_RF_bounds_final which contains weekly netcdfs that contain the RF derived storage bounds for all the reservoirs in our analysis. For methodology questions, please refer to Steyaert et al., 2025.
